# Teams Meeting Synthesis Template

Copy this template into the relevant project note or working draft. Replace placeholders with repository-backed facts or user-provided context. Leave unknown values blank or mark them as `Unknown`; do not invent them.

```markdown
# Meeting Synthesis — <Meeting Name> — <Date>

## Meeting purpose

## Short summary

## Decisions made

| Decision | Owner / approver | Evidence | Follow-up |
|---|---|---|---|
|  |  |  |  |

## Action items

| Action | Owner | Due / trigger | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
|  |  |  |  |

## Risks / blockers / dependencies

| Type | Item | Impact | Next step |
|---|---|---|---|
| Risk / Issue / Dependency |  |  |  |

## Stakeholder follow-up draft

## Project record updates to consider

## Open questions / missing inputs
```
